responsibilities: Analyze procurement spend data across categories to identify sourcing opportunities, cost-saving initiatives, and supplier consolidation strategies.
Evaluate supplier performance metrics, contract compliance, and purchasing trends to support strategic sourcing decisions.
Develop procurement dashboards and reports that provide visibility into spending patterns, supplier effectiveness, and savings achievements.
Conduct market research and benchmarking studies to support category management and supplier selection processes.
Collaborate with procurement managers and business stakeholders to improve sourcing strategies and purchasing efficiencies.
Assess supplier risks, contract obligations, and procurement compliance requirements to mitigate operational and financial exposure.
Support competitive bidding processes by analyzing vendor proposals, pricing structures, and total cost of ownership factors.
Prepare detailed procurement analyses and recommendations that drive cost optimization and supplier relationship improvements.
